boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations release a routine action when the dependency closure must match the requested object, scope, and release condition?

boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: The dependency closure DEP-MDV-005 specifies release condition RC-MDV-005-S, while the action ACT-DEP-MDV-005 requests release condition RC-MDV-005.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The dependency closure's release condition (RC-MDV-005-S) differs from the action's requested release condition (RC-MDV-005). This mismatch leaves the action boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The dependency closure DEP-MDV-005 was completed at 2026-06-17 09:05, before the queued release time of 2026-06-17 10:30 for ACT-DEP-MDV-005. However, the release condition specified in the closure (RC-MDV-005-S) does not exactly match the release condition for the action (RC-MDV-005).

final_answer: The action ACT-DEP-MDV-005 cannot proceed because the dependency closure DEP-MDV-005 has a mismatched release condition (RC-MDV-005-S) compared to the action's requested condition (RC-MDV-005). Although the closure occurred before the queued release time, this exactness failure leaves the action boundary open, necessitating escalation.
open_blockers: Exact dependency closure release condition mismatch.
